recommendations.title: Scream
recommendations.overview: A year after the murder of her mother, a teenage girl is terrorized by a masked killer who targets her and her friends by using scary movies as part of a deadly game.

recommendations.title: Summer of 84
recommendations.overview: After suspecting that their police officer neighbor is a serial killer, a group of teenage friends spend their summer spying on him and gathering evidence, but as they get closer to discovering the truth, things get dangerous.
recommendations.director: Yoann-Karl Whissell, François Simard, Anouk Whissell

recommendations.title: Ratsasan
recommendations.overview: A serial killer is murdering school girls, and a newbie cop has to track him down before the victim count increases.

recommendations.title: The Tripper
recommendations.overview: A Ronald Reagan-obsessed serial killer targets a bunch of hippies who are heading to a weekend-long concert.

recommendations.title: The Girl Who Got Away
recommendations.overview: A female serial killer who killed four young girls is sent away to prison, but a fifth victim escaped with her life. Twenty years later, the killer escapes and begins hunting for the one who got away.

recommendations.title: Martyrs
recommendations.overview: A woman and her childhood friend seek out revenge on those who victimized and abused them.

recommendations.title: Death's Roulette
recommendations.overview: Seven strangers wake up in a mansion in the middle of nowhere to discover they are part of a twisted game. They will have 60 minutes to choose one person to die; otherwise, all of them will be murdered. As the clock ticks down, the most lurid secrets

recommendations.title: Surveillance
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent tracks a serial killer with the help of three of his would-be victims - all of whom have wildly different stories to tell.

recommendations.title: The Pyramid
recommendations.overview: An archaeological team attempt to unlock the secrets of a lost pyramid only to find themselves hunted by an insidious creature.

recommendations.title: Kill Theory
recommendations.overview: While celebrating a graduation at a secluded vacation home, a group of college students find themselves targeted by a sadistic killer who forces them to play a deadly game of killing one another in order to survive.
